rulings.Case Title: THE VERLIS BROWN SMITH LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22,2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: This motion is brought in the trust case with notice given to the participants in the trust litigation, but it seeks relief from the estate without being brought in the estate case and without notice to the estate's beneficiaries whose interests would be affected. Moreover, there are on-going and potential petitions that could affect the appropriateness of the relief sought depending on what, if any, relief is obtained from Reginald Smith. Therefore, the current motion is denied without prejudice to its being renewed in a proper procedural setting and at an appropriate time. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must advise opposing parties and notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, October 10, 2012.
